# OurAI

> OurAI is the multiplayer AI workspace where a whole cross-functional team watches and steers AI coding agents over one GitHub repo, in real time — from idea intake all the way to shipped software. You start with a company, intake an idea, let AI refine the requirements with your business, promote it to a branch, and watch multiple agents build in parallel while a human approves every merge.

## What OurAI is

- A real-time, multiplayer workspace for building software with AI agents.
- The unit of work starts as an **idea** (project management / idea intake is the front door), becomes a **work item** on its own branch, and is built by an **agent** whose every action streams to a shared, append-only transcript that the whole team reads live.
- One company maps to one GitHub repository. Multiple agents run in parallel, each isolated on its own git worktree/branch. A human reviews the diff and approves every merge — there is no auto-merge.

## Who it is for (ICP)

- **Startups and product engineering teams that ship software.** Primary buyers/decision-makers: founders and CTOs, VPs and Directors of Engineering and Product, and engineering managers.
- Cross-functional product teams: product, project management, engineering, QA, design, marketing, and go-to-market — all in one room.
- A second product (in development) extends this to **marketing teams**: marketing joins as a first-class role so go-to-market strategy is coordinated alongside — coupled with — software shipping, not separated from it.

## How it is different

- **Multiplayer, not a solo copilot:** the whole team shares one live transcript.
- **Idea intake first:** AI refines requirements with the business before code is written.
- **Parallel agents, safe merges:** branch-per-agent isolation; AI rightsizes and rebalances work; humans approve merges.
- **Priced per agent, not per seat:** watchers are free; cost scales with agent-compute, roughly 10–18× cheaper than frontier-model tools.
- **Open source core:** AGPL-3.0 core you can self-host, Apache-2.0 SDK to build on.

## Integrations

- Bring your own key for model providers: DeepSeek (default), Anthropic Claude, Moonshot Kimi, and OpenAI — swap via one env var through the model gateway.
- Data & auth: Supabase (Postgres, magic-link auth, row-level security, Realtime). Analytics: PostHog. Email: Resend. Hosting & CI: Vercel and GitHub. See https://ourai.dev/integrations.

## How OurAI compares

- vs GitHub Copilot: Copilot is a per-seat in-editor copilot for one developer; OurAI puts the whole team in one live session and is priced per agent.
- vs Devin: Devin runs solo and opaque; OurAI streams every step to a shared transcript and never merges without a human.
- vs Cursor: Cursor optimizes one developer's editor; OurAI runs many agents in parallel on isolated branches for a whole team. See https://ourai.dev/compare.

- Early access / pre-signup. Join the waitlist on the homepage.
